package rulecoverage

func NegativeCacheInvalidationBeforeTransactionCommit() string {
    ruleID := "cache_invalidation_before_transaction_commit"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Cache mutation or eviction that happens before a write transaction commits."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
